prompt: Professional infographic titled 'AUTOMATE YOUR BUSINESS WITH AI' for Bishop AI. Style: bold dark mode editorial, premium tech brand aesthetic. Layout top to bottom: Section 1 — top header bar on pure black #000814 background, large bold white all-caps headline 'AUTOMATE YOUR BUSINESS WITH AI' at 72pt, subtitle below in gold #E0B848 'AI Automation + Training for Companies That Want to Grow Faster', small tagline 'bishopai.io' in blue #1894C9. Section 2 — full-width dark divider strip in deep navy #0D1B2A with centered white text 'HOW WE HELP' in bold caps. Section 3 — two tall side-by-side card columns on dark card background #1E2333 with rounded corners and subtle gold border #E0B848: LEFT CARD header icon of a robot/gear symbol, card title 'AI WORKFLOW AUTOMATION' in gold #E0B848 bold caps at 32pt, card subtitle 'Eliminate the busywork. Scale the output.' in white, then four bullet points in white Open Sans 18pt: '• Automate repetitive tasks with AI agents', '• Streamline end-to-end business processes', '• Connect your tools — no manual handoffs', '• Run workflows 24/7 without adding headcount'. RIGHT CARD header icon of a graduation cap, card title 'ENTERPRISE AI TRAINING' in blue #1894C9 bold caps at 32pt, card subtitle 'Build your team's AI capability from the inside out.' in white, then four bullet points in white Open Sans 18pt: '• AI tools training for every role', '• No-code development workshops', '• Machine learning fundamentals', '• Custom programs for your industry'. Section 4 — wide dark strip #000814 with three stat boxes side by side separated by gold vertical dividers: Box 1 large bold gold text 'AI AGENTS' subtext in white 'Doing the work for you'; Box 2 large bold blue text 'NO-CODE' subtext in white 'Anyone on your team can build'; Box 3 large bold gold text 'WORLDWIDE' subtext in white 'Serving businesses globally'. Section 5 — full-width CTA banner with bold gradient from dark blue #0D1B2A to black #000814, centered text: large white bold 'READY TO GROW FASTER?' at 48pt, below it blue #1894C9 text 'bishopai.io' at 36pt bold, below that small white text 'AI Automation · Enterprise Training · Custom Solutions'. Footer — black bar with small light gray text 'Bishop AI — Intelligent automation for modern businesses'. Leave a clean empty rectangular zone in the bottom-left corner of the footer approximately 120x45px with no text or elements — reserved for logo overlay. Color palette: pure black #000814, dark navy card #1E2333, gold #E0B848, electric blue #1894C9, white #FFFFFF, deep navy strip #0D1B2A. Typography: Poppins Bold for all headlines and card titles at 32-72pt, Montserrat SemiBold for subheadings at 22pt, Open Sans Regular for body bullets at 18pt — all text perfectly legible high contrast against dark backgrounds. Visual elements: thin gold horizontal rule under the header, subtle gold corner accents on cards, clean geometric dividers between sections. Quality directive: ultra-sharp print-quality detail, pixel-perfect alignment, zero text rendering errors, premium dark tech aesthetic. Negative: blurry text, garbled typography, illegible fonts, random decorative clutter, misaligned elements, overlapping labels, stock photo aesthetic, photorealistic faces, lens flare, bokeh, photography lighting, beauty filters, bright white backgrounds, lorem ipsum placeholder text.
